nasb.text: The mother of the lad said, “As the Lord lives and as you yourself live, I will not leave you.” And he arose and followed her.

esv.text: Then the mother of the child said, “As the Lord lives and as you yourself live, I will not leave you.” So he arose and followed her.

cnv.text: 孩子的母親說：“我指著永活的耶和華和你的性命起誓，我決不會離開你。”神人只好起身隨她而去。

ccb.text: 孩子的母亲说：“我凭永活的耶和华和你的性命起誓，你若不同去，我决不离开你。”于是，以利沙跟她同去。
